programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David comes up with a new business venture; Alexis adjusts to her first day of school.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: While setting up his business, David meets a new friend; Johnny defends Alexis' work; Moira deals with a difficult guest.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and Roland end up in a compromising situation; Alexis comes in between David and Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David's ex comes to town to do a photoshoot for Moira; Johnny and Roland think Bob is cheating at poker.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny tries to stop the spread of lice; Moira tries to get out of having a garden named after her.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira look for a location for the family portrait; David hosts a soft launch for the new store.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie celebrate having a fully booked hotel; David and Patrick go on a date.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira feels responsible for a hotel guest's death; David and Patrick make their romance official.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny gets thrown into the raw milk business; Moira tries to connect with the townspeople; David gives style advice.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira is worried that racy photos from her past will jeopardize the campaign; Johnny asks for financial help; Alexis gets a job.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira meet with a key demographic; Alexis struggles with her new job; David offers emotional support to his boss' daughter.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira have to deal with a surprise motel guest; Alexis and David go apartment hunting.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira's campaign takes a turn when some of her lawn signs mysteriously disappear; David and Alexis must work together to get David's boss out of legal trouble.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira see a couple they knew in a past life; Alexis and David go to Mutt's annual barn party.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny searches for a new purpose; Moira faces the realities of politics.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Stevie try to come to terms with their new relationship; Alexis and Moira plan a mother/daughter lunch.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira try to get a deal on a used car; David helps Stevie put her great aunt to rest.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira worry about the future of the motel; David panics at the thought of retaking his driving test.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny puts the motel in jeopardy when he rents rooms to a dubious enterprise; David helps Moira with a film audition.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie pitch a deal to a nearby golf course; Moira tries to get out of Twyla's murder mystery party.

programme.desc: David comes up with a new business venture; Alexis adjusts to her first day of school.

programme.desc: Johnny and Moira see a couple they knew in a past life; Alexis and David go to Mutt's annual barn party.

programme.desc: Johnny searches for a new purpose; Moira faces the realities of politics.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Stevie try to come to terms with their new relationship; Alexis and Moira plan a mother/daughter lunch.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny prepares himself after finding a positive pregnancy test; David and Patrick search for privacy.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira prepares for her headline debut at the Asbestos Fest; David deals with some loitering teens in the apothecary.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Twyla go out for a girls' night; David gets a lesson on compromise.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: A rumour that Moira died appears online; Roland asks Johnny to be the godfather of his child.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Patrick host an open mic night; Johnny and Stevie start rebranding the hotel.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roses plan a barbecue; David confronts his comfort level with Patrick; Alexis investigates a mysterious text.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Stevie set out on a romantic getaway; Johnny steps in at a Jazzagals rehearsal and wows everyone with his skills; Alexis tests out a dating app.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David looks for a way to reconcile with Patrick after spending time away from him; Moira pitches the idea of a singles week event.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira get too involved at a singles event; Alexis runs into an old friend.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira tries to get out of jury duty; David runs damage control for a Rose Apothecary product.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Singles Week kicks off just as Jocelyn's baby is born; Patrick and David take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny wants to celebrate the holidays with an old-fashioned Rose Family Christmas Party, but it takes a lot to get everyone on board at the last minute; Moira brings a negative attitude to Christmas tree shopping.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira films a movie in Bosnia, hoping to revive her career; David tries to take his relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira loses sleep stressing over old love letters; David and Stevie get held up at the store.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Johnny come up with a plan to impress a motel reviewer; David and Patrick look for an apartment.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny finds himself under financial pressure with the arrival of Moira's high-priced red carpet gown for the Crows movie premiere; David is conned into taking a road trip with Stevie.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Ted finally lets loose at David and Patrick's housewarming party; Johnny and Moira baby-sit Roland Jr.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and the Jazzagals take Jocelyn to the casino; Johnny has a conversation with Stevie about intimacy in the workplace.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny believes Ted's mom is attracted to him; Moira gets involved in a local musical production.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie attend the hospitality awards; Moira tries to stop Alexis from auditioning for Cabaret.

programme.desc: Johnny prepares himself after finding a positive pregnancy test; David and Patrick search for privacy.
